title: Pancakes
instructions: In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, salt and sugar.
Make a well in the center and pour in the milk, egg and melted butter; mix until smooth.
Heat a lightly oiled griddle or frying pan over medium high heat.
Pour or scoop the batter onto the griddle, using approximately 1/4 cup for each pancake.
Brown on both sides and serve hot.

title: Avocado Toast
instructions: Toast the bread to your liking.
Mash the avocado in a bowl and season with salt and pepper.
Spread the mashed avocado on the toast.
Sprinkle with red pepper flakes if desired.

title: Scrambled Eggs
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, salt, and pepper.
In a skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
Pour in the egg mixture and cook, stirring occasionally, until the eggs are cooked to your liking.

title: Oatmeal
instructions: In a small saucepan, bring water or milk and salt to a boil.
Stir in oats and reduce heat to low. Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the oats are cooked through.
Top with your favorite toppings and serve.

title: French Toast
instructions: In a shallow dish, whisk together eggs, milk, vanilla, and cinnamon.
Dip each slice of bread into the egg mixture, soaking both sides.
In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
Add the bread to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until golden brown.
Serve hot with your favorite toppings.

title: Smoothie
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into a glass and serve immediately.

title: Muffins
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Grease and flour a 12-cup muffin pan.
In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, combine egg, milk, and oil. Pour into the dry ingredients and mix until just moistened.
Fill muffin cups 2/3 full.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.

title: Waffles
instructions: Preheat waffle iron.
In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, beat egg yolks. Stir in milk and oil. Pour into the dry ingredients and mix until just moistened.
In another bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Fold into the batter.
Pour batter onto hot waffle iron and cook until golden brown.

title: Crepes
instructions: In a blender, combine all ingredients and blend until smooth. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat a lightly oiled skillet over medium-high heat.
Pour about 1/4 cup of batter into the skillet and swirl to coat the bottom. Cook for 1-2 minutes per side, until golden brown.
Fill with your favorite fillings.

title: Frittata
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs and milk. Stir in cheese, cooked vegetables or meat, salt, and pepper.
Pour into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the eggs are set.

title: Omelette
ingredients: Fillings: shredded cheese, diced ham, chopped vegetables
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, salt, and pepper.
In a skillet, melt butter over medium-high heat.
Pour in the egg mixture. As the eggs begin to set, gently pull the eggs toward the center of the pan with a spatula, and tilt the pan to allow the uncooked eggs to flow underneath.
When the eggs are almost set, add your favorite fillings to one side of the omelette.
Fold the other side of the omelette over the fillings and slide onto a plate.
